## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build:all` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New tools are registered in `tool-registry.ts` and documented in `README.md`
- [ ] Plugin changes have been compiled (`npm run build:plugin`) and `figma-plugin/code.js` is committed
